questions.text: The coefficient of x in 3x + 5 is:
questions.explanation: In the expression 3x + 5, the coefficient of x is 3 (the number multiplying x).

questions.text: Terms with same variables are called like terms.
questions.explanation: Like terms have the same variables raised to the same powers. They can be added or subtracted.

questions.correctAnswer: An algebraic expression with only one term.
questions.explanation: A monomial is an expression with one term. Examples: 5x, 3y², 7. Binomial has two terms, trinomial has three.

questions.text: The value of 2x + 3 when x = 4 is ________.
